title: No Modern Mobs
description: Removes mobs that aren't in Beta 1.7.3
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## What this mod does
Mobs from Beta 1.7.3 and above are removed from terrain generation, apart from in certain structures (such as the Bastion), but these can be removed along with the structures in [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-more-structures-essential).

## Only mobs that are left:
Passive Mobs

- Chicken
- Cow
- Pig
- Sheep
- Squid

Neutral Mobs

- Enderman (added in Beta 1.8 but included here for completeness, so the game is actually beatable)

Hostile Mobs

- Creeper
- Skeleton
- Spider
- Zombie
- Slime
- Spider Jockey (a combination of a skeleton riding a spider)
- Zombie Pigman (in the Nether)
- Ghast

Tamable Mobs

- Wolf
